title: Boolean expressions in WHERE clause, result in incorrect resulsts
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE boolean_test (b UInt8 NOT NULL, i Int32 NOT NULL, s String);
INSERT INTO boolean_test (b, i, s) VALUES (1, 1, 'A'), (0, 2, 'B'), (1, 3, 'C'), (0, 4, 'D');
CREATE TABLE additional_test (x Int32 NOT NULL, y UInt8 NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM boolean_test WHERE b = 1 OR (i > 2) AND (s IS NOT NULL);
